title: 空流优化包 | SkyFlow Optimized
description: 更适合中国宝宝体制的整合包 空流优化包是一款专为Minecraft 高版本版本设计的轻量级优化模组包。SkyFlow Optimized is a lightweight optimization mod pack specifically designed for higher versions of Minecraft.
body:
# SkyFlow Optimized Modpack

> A lightweight, performance-focused Fabric modpack for Minecraft | Smooth gameplay without lag, making survival more comfortable across multiple versions

![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.20.X%20%7C%201.21.X-green?style=for-the-badge)
![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-d6c4ff?style=for-the-badge)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY--NC--SA%204.0-ef6c00?style=for-the-badge)

---

## 🛡️ Important Disclaimer

> **⚠️ Convenience Features & Usage Risks**
>
> This modpack includes **client-side convenience mods** (e.g., **MASA (Tweakeroo), InvMove**, and the *Boat Item View* feature from Tweakeroo) that provide optional quality‑of‑life functions such as:
> - **Free Camera** (spectator‑like view)
> - **Movement while GUI is open**
> - **Third‑person “stealth” view** (Boat Item View)
>
> **Please note:**  
> On **multiplayer servers**, these features may be considered **cheating or exploits**, and their use could violate server‑specific rules, potentially resulting in **kicks, bans, or other penalties**.
>
> You can safely **remove these specific mods** if you wish to ensure compliance — the rest of the modpack will function normally.
>
> **📜 Liability Notice:**  
> It is the **user’s sole responsibility** to review and abide by each server’s rules before using any mod-assisted functionality. Any account or gameplay penalties incurred from the use of these mods **are not the responsibility of the modpack author.**
>
> **Play fairly and know your server’s policies.**

---

> **⚠️ Health & Safety Warning: Visual Effects Mod**
>
> The mod **[增强视觉效果／拓展视觉效果] EnhancedVisuals_FABRIC_v1.8.24_mcx.x.x.jar** adds intense visual feedback for damage, poisoning, etc., which may potentially trigger adverse reactions in players with certain health conditions.
>
> **Potential Risks Include:**
> - Intense or flashing effects that may affect players with **photosensitive epilepsy**, **migraines**, or similar neurological sensitivities.
> - Sudden screen distortions, color shifts, or simulated "damage" effects that could cause discomfort, dizziness, or elevated heart rate.
> - May pose a risk to players with pre-existing **heart conditions**, **anxiety disorders**, or other related health concerns.
>
> **Strong Recommendation:**
> If you have a known sensitivity, medical condition, or prefer stable visuals, it is **highly advised to remove this mod**.
>
> **How to Remove:**
> 1. Navigate to your `.minecraft/mods` folder.
> 2. Locate and delete the file:  
>    `[增强视觉效果／拓展视觉效果] EnhancedVisuals_FABRIC_v1.8.24_mcx.x.x.jar`
>
> **Note:** This mod is optional for immersion. Your well-being comes first—please customize your modpack for your comfort and safety.
>
> *This is a community-provided notice based on user reports. Always consult a medical professional if you have specific health concerns.*

---

## ✨ Modpack Overview

SkyFlow Optimized is a **lightweight performance modpack** built on the **Fabric** loader, designed to eliminate stuttering and deliver buttery-smooth gameplay while maintaining vanilla-friendly features.Each optimization package maintains an average of 70+ mods while keeping loading blocks and other aspects smooth for an optimal experience.

**Multi-Version Support:**
- ✅ **Minecraft 26.1+** (Latest features & optimizations)
- ✅ **Minecraft 1.21.8+** (Latest features & optimizations)
- ❌ **Minecraft 1.21.0-1.21.7** (Currently in preparatio))
- ❌ **Minecraft 1.20.X** (Currently in preparation)

> 💡 **Design Philosophy**: This modpack focuses on **lightweight optimization**—enhancing stability and gameplay experience without extreme performance squeezing. Perfect for long-term survival play!

---

## 🎯 Key Features

### 🚀 Performance Optimization
- **Sodium + Lithium + FerriteCore** - The performance trifecta for maximum FPS
- **EntityCulling** - Intelligent entity rendering optimization
- **ImmediatelyFast** - Instant world loading and rendering improvements
- **Async Particles** - Particle system optimization

### 🎨 Visual Enhancements
- **Iris Shaders** - Full shader support with Sodium compatibility
- **ETF/EMF** - Entity Texture Features & Model Features for dynamic visuals
- **Enhanced Visuals** - Subtle environmental effects and improvements

### ⚙️ Quality of Life
- **Jade** - Smart block and entity information display
- **Inventory Profiles Next** - One-click inventory management
- **InvMove** - Move while interacting with interfaces
- **MASA Mod** - Advanced utilities including Free Camera mode

### 🔊 Audio Immersion
- **Ambient Sounds** - Dynamic environmental audio
- **Sound Physics Remastered** - Realistic sound propagation
- **Entity Sound Features** - Enhanced creature audio

### 🌐 Multiplayer & Social
- **Simple Voice Chat** - Proximity-based voice communication
- **Xaero's Minimap & World Map** - Essential navigation tools
- **Chat Reporting Helper** - Chat management utilities

---

## 📥 Download & Installation

### Version-Specific Downloads:

| Minecraft Version  | Status |
|-------------------|---------|
| **26.1** |  ✅ **Latest Features** |
| **1.21.8+** |  ✅ **Latest Features** |
| **1.21.0-1.21.7** |  ✅ **Stable(Currently in preparation)** |
| **1.20.X** |  ✅ **Long-term Support(Currently in preparation)** |

### 🟢 Quick Installation (3 Steps):

1. **Download** the appropriate `.mrpack` file for your Minecraft version
2. **Drag & Drop** the file into your PCL2, Prism, or hmcl window
3. **Launch** - The launcher auto-configures everything!

> ⚠️ **First Launch Notes:**
> - Automatic dependency installation - please wait patiently
> - Allocate **6GB+ RAM** (8GB+ if using shaders)
> - Modpack occupies ~150-230MB storage depending on version

---

## 🚀 Performance Results

### Benchmark System:
- **CPU**: i5-9400F
- **GPU**: GTX 960 2GB  
- **RAM**: 32GB
- **Allocation**: 6GB to Minecraft

### Performance Comparison:

| Scenario | Vanilla | SkyFlow Optimized | Improvement |
|----------|---------|-------------------|-------------|
| **Exploration (FPS)** | 230-270 with stutters | Stable 300+ | +30-100% |
| **Idle (FPS)** | ~300-400 | Stable 450+ | +50% |
| **Chunk Loading** | Noticeable lag | Smooth, instant | Major improvement |
| **Memory Usage** | High, frequent GC | Optimized, stable | Significant reduction |
| **1000 Boat Items (FPS)** | ~31 | 44+ | ~40%+ |

> **Technical Achievement**: SkyFlow doesn't just increase FPS—it achieves **true frame-time stability** by eliminating rendering and logic bottlenecks at their source.

---

## 🎨 Optional Visual Enhancements

### Curated Texture Packs Collection:

All texture packs are **performance-optimized** and available for all supported versions.

#### 🔧 UI & Interface
- `GUI Texture Overhaul` - Stylized HUD and health displays
- `Rainbow XP Animation` - Vibrant experience bar effects
- `Clear Slot Highlighting` - Enhanced inventory visibility

#### ✨ Visual Details  
- `Unique Textures` - Comprehensive block/texture refresh
- `Contoured Ores` - Brilliant underground mineral visibility
- `Clean Connected Glass` - Seamless glass aesthetics
- `Animated Totems` - Enhanced totem of undying visuals

#### 🌿 Creatures & Environment
- `Young Ender Dragon` - Refreshed ender dragon appearance
- `Blinking Ender Eyes` - Animated end portal improvements
- `Simple Grass & Flowers` - Natural environment enhancements

#### 🎵 Audio Improvements
- `Enhanced Explosions` - Richer, more impactful detonations
- `Smoother Weather` - Reduced weather audio abruptness

#### 🌐 Localization Support
- Complete Chinese translations for popular mods
- `Cat Girl Language Pack` - Optional cute text styling
- Xaero's Map, Sodium, and mod menu translations

> 🎯 **Usage Tip**: Enable resource packs individually in-game to test performance impact and personal preference.

---

## 🛠️ Technical Notes

### Version-Specific Considerations:
**Minecraft 26.1（Prioritize updating and follow-up support）**
- Latest Fabric API and mod versions
- Full feature set including newest optimizations
- Recommended for most users
- 
**Minecraft 1.21.8+（This version has become stable.）**
- Latest Fabric API and mod versions
- Full feature set including newest optimizations
- Recommended for most users

**Minecraft 1.21.0-1.21.7(Currently in preparation)**
- Stable, well-tested mod combinations
- Mature optimization stack
- Perfect for servers and long-term worlds

**Minecraft 1.20.X(Currently in preparation)**
- Long-term support version
- Maximum compatibility with existing worlds
- Conservative but reliable performance gains

## 🎮 Ready to Play?

**Choose your version, download, and experience Minecraft like never before!**

> *"Finally, a modpack that just works—no tweaking needed!"* - Satisfied User
> 
> *"Went from unplayable stutters to buttery smooth on my old laptop!"* - Happy Player

**Thank you for choosing SkyFlow Optimized!** 🚀✨

---

**Last updated: April 2026 | Supports Minecraft 1.20.X ~ 26.1**
